g.desc: World map, with the contours of the continents, and with the hosts, team residences, and offices denoted with special symbols. There are three possible 'views' of the map, focussed on Europe, East Asia, and the Americas, respectively, and the user can click on a part of the World to change the view. The default (initial) view is focussed on Europe.
Map of the World, with focus on Europe. Initially visible.

rect.desc: By clicking, the visibility of #Europe is down, and visibility of #US is on
By clicking, the visibility of #Europe is down, and visibility of #Asia is on

g.desc: Map of the World, with focus on East Asia. Initially invisible.

rect.desc: By clicking, the visibility of #Asia is down, and visibility of #Europe is on
By clicking, the visibility of #Asia is down, and visibility of #US is on

g.desc: Map of the World, with focus on the Americas. Initially invisible.

rect.desc: By clicking, the visibility of #US is down, and visibility of #Asia is on
By clicking, the visibility of #US is down, and visibility of #Europe is on

g.desc: Series of flags in two blocks from left to right: first the hosts, then the countries in an office region, both blocks in alphabetical order
